auditor: Ribeyre Chang Haylock Keetley Chartered Professional Accountants
economic_notes: Significant new funding includes $335,400 from First Nations Health Authority for Covid-19 related funding and $611,435 from BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing. Band owns interests in Kitasoo Seafoods Ltd., Kitasoo Development Corporation, Kitasoo Hydro Power Ltd., Kitasoo Forest Company Ltd., Klemtu Tourism Ltd., Kitasoo Band Store Ltd., Kitasoo Development GP Ltd., and Kitasoo Aqua Farm Ltd. Also holds 10% partnership interest in Sea Coastal Transportation Ltd.
notes: Summary financial statements only - detailed fund schedules not included in provided text. Eight entities accounted for using modified equity method (GBEs): Kitasoo Seafoods Ltd., Kitasoo Development Corporation, Kitasoo Hydro Power Ltd., Kitasoo Forest Company Ltd., Klemtu Tourism Ltd., Kitasoo Band Store Ltd., Kitasoo Development GP Ltd., Kitasoo Aqua Farm Ltd. Enterprise Fund shows negative revenue and expenses due to elimination/consolidation adjustments. Prior year (2020) revenue was unusually high ($36.6M) partly due to $5,190,168 in Treaty Negotiations Funding and $2,155,000 from Coast Opportunity Funds and $15,319,890 in Band Owned Enterprises revenue. No remuneration schedule included in provided text. Annual debt service calculated from scheduled principal reductions and cash flow statement financing activities.
